intro: Anacamptis boryi, also known as the Bory's orchid or green-winged orchid, is a perennial plant species belonging to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Anacamptis boryi include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. In traditional herbal medicine, Anacamptis boryi is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in tinctures and capsules, to harness its therapeutic benefits.
